title: 10 precautions to take when using Lobelia inflata (Lobelia) for medicinal purposes
intro: Lobelia inflata, also known as Indian tobacco, is a medicinal plant with potential therapeutic effects, but it should be used with caution due to its toxicity in high doses. Before using Lobelia inflata, consult with a healthcare professional to determine the appropriate dosage and to ensure it doesn't interact negatively with any existing medical conditions or medications. When using Lobelia inflata, start with a low dose and gradually increase it to minimize the risk of side effects, which can include nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Do not use Lobelia inflata if pregnant or breastfeeding, as its safety in these populations has not been established. In case of an overdose or adverse reaction, seek immediate medical attention.
